name: Tencent (Hunyuan)
steps: Visit Tencent Cloud Console and complete real-name auth
Go to Hunyuan > API Key page
Click "Create API Key" to generate a key
Copy the generated key (used as Bearer token with the OpenAI-compatible endpoint)
Paste it above and click "Validate & Save"
notes: Free tier: Hunyuan-Lite (5 QPS). OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Does NOT support tool calling.
